0.name: Disassembly Pair Corpus
0.summary: The complete FirstIDA-DB dataset generation record: ~85K matched (C source, x86-64 disassembly) function pairs with build metadata and content hashes, the ~14K-row log of source files that failed to compile, and the 116-repo provenance ledger of upstream GitHub projects. Together these three tables record what was produced, what was dropped, and where it came from.
